ab: kaysa’an ray kakiSka:atan ’am homayaw ka basang, ray kakiSka:atan ’akoey ka pinatawaw ka’a’inola’en.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: hayza’ rara:hoeh ka Sina:iS, tomako: ka mali’, ’ae’ae:aew, homlal ki mae’nae’ ka boehoe:.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: yako mam ’ae’ae:aew, yako ngizo’ ila, poe’oe’ ma’an ramoramo’an ila.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: ’ana nakhini ya:o ma’ min’itol naehan, ’okay patae’aes ’am ’ae’ae:aew.
ch: 但我站起來，繼續向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: yako talsekel ila, saeboeh mae’iyaeh ma’ kin Siyae’.
ch: 我到終點時所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: ’ana ’okay mari’ ka minay ’aehae’ Sinepe:, yako ma’ kin Siyae’, yako hayza’ paksizaeh ’am ’a’inola.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
